column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One sample per line.
# Use this for batch runs; single-sample runs can use config.yaml directly.
#   sample        - output directory name for this Space Ranger run
#   fastqs        - directory containing FASTQ files for this sample
#   transcriptome - path to Space Ranger-compatible reference transcriptome
#   image         - absolute path to brightfield or fluorescence microscope image (.tif)
#   area          - capture area on the slide: A1
# Note: for test/validation runs without a physical slide
# 'slide' and 'area' with a single 'unknown_slide' column (value: visium-1).
# Optional: Titan integration (append to each row; leave blank if unused)
